maybe 7BXX? 
but either way I'm happy with trying out stuff even if it sounds too weak

[2020-12-03 12:57] silentslayers: while 8BX you would consider more
[2020-12-03 12:57] silentslayers: i think 8BX is the best even though it might feel bad at first
[2020-12-03 12:57] silentslayers: i think it fits power level of single blue
[2020-12-03 12:57] silentslayers: its a defensive color
[2020-12-03 12:58] silentslayers: alright i dunno whats next
[2020-12-03 12:58] silentslayers: just the consensus units?
[2020-12-03 12:59] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Reminder for Chrono Filter Start of Turn ability to be changed to Click ability
[2020-12-03 13:00] velizar_ (Name): should we discuss the new units? did felid feel too strong to people? I felt that just like bombander, it would be the strongest after you already have attackers (otherwise you're wasting some of its potential on absorb), but even when bought as a first attacker, it was already viable, which made me think that buying it after attackers, or even worse later in the game (turn 8-10 or so), would be way too strong, so at 7RR it might still be strong
[2020-12-03 13:00] Deleted User (Deleted User): i think if not denying sorb 8BX tooth is shitter than militia, no?
[2020-12-03 13:00] silentslayers: Wanna write that up Terra?
[2020-12-03 13:00] Deleted User (Deleted User): tho i think militia should be 5B 2hp
[2020-12-03 13:00] velizar_ (Name): and auto maid seemed too weak compared to shredder?
[2020-12-03 13:00] silentslayers: auto maid is weak for sure
[2020-12-03 13:00] silentslayers: giving it energy is the only idea we had
[2020-12-03 13:01] velizar_ (Name): giving it energy sounds better than nothing to me
[2020-12-03 13:02] p0lari (Polari): do we need to have a paragraph on each unit if it's mostly going to be obvious surface level stuff
[2020-12-03 13:02] velizar_ (Name): I guess it doesn't hurt - I'm assuming the text is just for Discord users here
[2020-12-03 13:03] silentslayers: **Auto Maid:** Now gives 1 energy per turn.

Notes: Auto Maid is a little weak (compare it to shredder). However, buffing it just a little could make it too strong for rushes or other contexts. We propose it gives you an energy per turn. This fits thematically with the engineer it consumes, and will help you econ more, or power units like galvani, electrovore and cauterizer.
[2020-12-03 13:03] silentslayers: No polari, but I think it will motivate elyot to take on our changes
[2020-12-03 13:03] silentslayers: I think it's a good gesture
[2020-12-03 13:03] silentslayers: If you guys think it's not a good idea I can stop
[2020-12-03 13:04] p0lari (Polari): I was primarily thinking lancetooth, where elyot is going to read that and go ok but we had that version before and we changed it for a reason, and this write-up just states some basic differences without going into why we want the old version back now
[2020-12-03 13:05] p0lari (Polari): I mean obviously if there's something interesting to say that's not immediately obvious that's great and all
[2020-12-03 13:05] p0lari (Polari): but half of that feels forced
[2020-12-03 13:05] velizar_ (Name): why was lancetooth changed from the old version?
[2020-12-03 13:05] silentslayers: Well the stuff I wrote about lance tooth is exactly why it should be changed
[2020-12-03 13:06] silentslayers: Too good at ramping for a blue unit
[2020-12-03 13:06] silentslayers: I dunno why it's bad to write it the way im writing it
[2020-12-03 13:06] silentslayers: it feels forced to you but it's not hurting anyone being a bit concise
[2020-12-03 13:06] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): **Chrono Filter** The Start of Turn ability is changed to a Click ability.

Notes: Gives you more control over when to gain the resources that it provides. The unit at its current state feels very clunky in its use. Allowing you to delay when you get the resources will let you plan out your future turns more easily.
[2020-12-03 13:06] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Let me know if I should change the note
[2020-12-03 13:07] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): I've no idea what I'm doing lol
[2020-12-03 13:07] p0lari (Polari): ...you mean verbose I assume?
[2020-12-03 13:08] velizar_ (Name): Chrono filter might be too strong that way - part of its charm to me was its clunkiness, and being unable to think far enough ahead to use it well - although if better players are saying that it's impossible to use chrono filter well, then it might not be very good
[2020-12-03 13:09] silentslayers: I'm fine with it changed to the click
[2020-12-03 13:09] silentslayers: the clunkyness is reduced a little yeah, but I think that's ok
[2020-12-03 13:09] velizar_ (Name): though now I realize that if you don't click it, you're still wasting resources
[2020-12-03 13:09] velizar_ (Name): so it's not a very big change
[2020-12-03 13:09] silentslayers: yeah it's a slight buff
[2020-12-03 13:10] velizar_ (Name): it's just more forgiving, but still not fully forgiving
[2020-12-03 13:10] velizar_ (Name): it forgives, but doesn't forget
[2020-12-03 13:14] silentslayers: Ok re-reading the lance tooth i have no idea what you mean by forced, it's literally exactly why it should be nerfed without writing an essay
[2020-12-03 13:15] silentslayers: 1. lance teeth punish high econ
2. color of attack and defense
3. Lance still good to buy on new version when it's denying 1
[2020-12-03 13:16] silentslayers: I just said that with full sentences
[2020-12-03 13:16] Deleted User (Deleted User): dw the kid is not a native english speaker
[2020-12-03 13:16] silentslayers: yeah i dunno why bring that up after re-reading what i wrote
[2020-12-03 13:17] silentslayers: obviously elyot is going to need reasons
[2020-12-03 13:19] silentslayers: So ferriten, cryo, trinity, ebb need discussion

[2020-12-03 14:07] velizar_ (Name): currently ferritin can't really replace blastforge for soak, I think?

[2020-12-03 14:09] velizar_ (Name): which might be a good thing tbh

[2020-12-03 14:10] Deleted User (Deleted User): wall aside blue's shit
[2020-12-03 14:10] Deleted User (Deleted User): hang on is it still worht it to keep ferritining into wall? woud be lulz if yes

[2020-12-03 14:10] p0lari (Polari): ferritin has fairly poor roi but it's not extremely bad or anything
[2020-12-03 14:11] Deleted User (Deleted User): to think rhino is so shit
[2020-12-03 14:11] p0lari (Polari): ferritin into wall is reasonably efficient *if* your resources usage somehow lines up conveniently for it
[2020-12-03 14:11] Deleted User (Deleted User): you would bt1 ferritin into wall
[2020-12-03 14:11] megasupp (mega-supp): probably some cynestra line or smth can get close to buying 10 ferritins
[2020-12-03 14:11] Deleted User (Deleted User): reasonably efficient as in more than rhino?

[2020-12-03 14:11] Deleted User (Deleted User): i like this if its not busted
[2020-12-03 14:15] p0lari (Polari): hmm actually now that I think through it again it is pretty bad roi, apparently the details just didn't stick with me and it's annoying to think through weird small costs involving resources to compare them to other units
[2020-12-03 14:16] p0lari (Polari): how does the efficiency for ferritin into wall work out specifically now, it's 4 + 1R paid two turns ago
[2020-12-03 14:16] p0lari (Polari): what do you get with that assuming some typical inflation
[2020-12-03 14:17] p0lari (Polari): with drone inflation that would be... 7.5ish total? compared to 6.67 for a straight up wall

[2020-12-03 14:20] megasupp (mega-supp): I think spamming ferritins is still better than rhino

[2020-12-03 14:26] megasupp (mega-supp): But if you start spamming ferritins it's like selling an animus to buy 2 forges only a turn later

[2020-12-03 14:27] megasupp (mega-supp): And rhino gets to attack once
[2020-12-03 14:27] velizar_ (Name): an attacking rhino is not as bad as a soaking rhino
[2020-12-03 14:28] p0lari (Polari): anyway current ferritin buffed to bt1 would be drone roi so it's definitely not too good purely by the numbers, giving that kind of flexibility at a more normal efficiency might be a bad idea but that's a different question
[2020-12-03 14:28] velizar_ (Name): a pseudo-vigilant rhino is even better
[2020-12-03 14:28] terrareveene (Terra Reveene): Rhino threatens for 1 though
[2020-12-03 14:28] megasupp (mega-supp): I mean you can either start ferritin spam and get wall in 2 turns or spam rhinos
[2020-12-03 14:29] megasupp (mega-supp): Rhino attacks once and gets soaked
[2020-12-03 14:29] megasupp (mega-supp): Yeah rhino threat is a good point actually
[2020-12-03 14:32] megasupp (mega-supp): Initial investment on sacs is lower though
[2020-12-03 14:35] megasupp (mega-supp): TL note when masn talks about bt1 version he talks about 3r->3b

[2020-12-03 14:39] masn6811 (Masne98888): ferritin into wall isnt bad. 3R for two engis now, and 2 for a barrier next turn

[2020-12-05 08:21] awaclus: magna is fine and has nothing to do with Asteri
[2020-12-05 08:22] awaclus: or rather, at this point I'm more worried that it's too strong than too weak, but it's probably balanced
[2020-12-05 08:24] awaclus: for the cost of 16GGBB, you get an opportunity to sell 2 drones back, deal 5 damage immediately, and get a 3 damage attacker that is semi breach resistant
[2020-12-05 08:29] awaclus: the ability to sell drones back is so good that you're willing to pay B for it, as evidenced by Ebb, and 5 damage is worth about 10 gold, so effectively the price you pay for the 3 damage attacker ends up being about 6GGB
[2020-12-05 08:29] awaclus: but on the other hand, it's bt2

> 
> but on the other hand, it's bt2
uh
[2020-12-05 08:32] Deleted User (Deleted User): btw how often do u click magna

because the opponent defends it
